  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): BET links + Sentinel-LK-Biopsie
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)seitenlokalisation
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [SNOMED CT: 80248007](http://snomed.info/id/80248007) (Left breast structure)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)intention
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Kurative Intention
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)op-dauer-min
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 90
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)tumor-conference-consent
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)pre-op-markierung
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Drahtmarkierung
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)notes
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): BET links OAQ, SLNB links. Präoperative Drahtmarkierung geplant.
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "QR-OPPlanung-Fall1",
  "questionnaire" : "https://www.senologie.org/fhir/Questionnaire/senologie-op-planung",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/Fall1-Patient-Erika-Neumann"
  },
  "authored" : "2025-01-28",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "op-art",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "BET links + Sentinel-LK-Biopsie"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "seitenlokalisation",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueCoding" : {
        "system" : "http://snomed.info/sct",
        "code" : "80248007",
        "display" : "Left breast structure"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "intention",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Kurative Intention"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "op-dauer-min",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 90
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "tumor-conference-consent",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : true
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "pre-op-markierung",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Drahtmarkierung"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "notes",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "BET links OAQ, SLNB links. Präoperative Drahtmarkierung geplant."
    }]
  }]
}

```
